action.reasoning: Observation: MLP on Morgan FP (2048bit,r=3) reached val MAE~0.231 (eval 0.231), worse than prior RF baseline (0.219). Train loss decreased smoothly but plateaued above RF performance. Analysis: High-dim binary FPs suit tree ensembles better than small MLP; XGB typically outperforms RF on such regression tasks with similar features. Mordred too slow for 105k mols, 3D GNNs had prior segfaults. Decision: Install xgboost, rewrite model.py/train.py/predict.py for XGBRegressor(n_est=300,depth=9,lr=0.1,hist) on same FP featurization; full data, log val_mae, save as pkl; train+submit_eval for improved baseline and timing before further opts (e.g. more boosting rounds, hybrid feats, or GNN).
